name: hasDerivAt_auxPolynomial
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem hasDerivAt_auxPolynomial
    (m n : Nat) (x : Real) :
    HasDerivAt (fun y : Real => Belyi1980.auxPolynomial m n y)
      ((m : Real) * x ^ (m - 1) * (1 - x) ^ n -
        (n : Real) * x ^ m * (1 - x) ^ (n - 1)) x := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: prove the derivative formula for x^m * (1 - x)^n. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: middle_linear_factor_zero
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem middle_linear_factor_zero
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    (m : Real) * (1 - (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) -
        (n : Real) * ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) = 0 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the middle point m/(m+n) makes the derivative's linear factor vanish. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: derivativeValue_auxPolynomial_middle_eq_zero
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem derivativeValue_auxPolynomial_middle_eq_zero
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    (m : Real) * ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ (m - 1) *
          (1 - (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ n -
        (n : Real) * ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ m *
          (1 - (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ (n - 1) = 0 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the full derivative value vanishes at the middle point m/(m+n). Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: hasDerivAt_auxPolynomial_middle_zero
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem hasDerivAt_auxPolynomial_middle_zero
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    HasDerivAt (fun y : Real => Belyi1980.auxPolynomial m n y) 0
      ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the middle point m/(m+n) is a critical point of the auxiliary polynomial. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: hasDerivAt_normalizedAuxPolynomial_middle_zero
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem hasDerivAt_normalizedAuxPolynomial_middle_zero
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    HasDerivAt (fun y : Real => Belyi1980.normalizedAuxPolynomial m n y) 0
      ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the middle point m/(m+n) remains critical after Belyi's normalization. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: middle_mem_unit_interval
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem middle_mem_unit_interval
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    0 < (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real) ∧
      (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real) < 1 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the middle point m/(m+n) lies in the unit interval for positive m,n. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: one_sub_middle_eq_right_ratio
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem one_sub_middle_eq_right_ratio
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    1 - (m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real) =
      (n : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real) := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: rewrite 1 - m/(m+n) as n/(m+n). Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: normalizedAuxPolynomial_middle_eq_one
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem normalizedAuxPolynomial_middle_eq_one
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    Belyi1980.normalizedAuxPolynomial m n
      ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) = 1 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: after Belyi's scaling, the middle critical point maps to 1. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: middle_power_product_pos
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem middle_power_product_pos
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    0 <
      ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ m *
        ((n : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ n := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki/Belyi middle-value arithmetic: for positive m,n, the middle value (m/(m+n))^m*(n/(m+n))^n is positive. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: middle_power_product_le_quarter
header:
import HilbertTest.Belyi1980.Polynomial

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem middle_power_product_le_quarter
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) (hn : 0 < n) :
    ((m : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ m *
        ((n : Real) / ((m + n : Nat) : Real)) ^ n <= 1 / 4 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Mochizuki Lemma 2.1 middle-value arithmetic: (m/(m+n))^m*(n/(m+n))^n is at most 1/4 by AM-GM. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/

name: auxPolynomial_zero
header:

open Real

namespace HilbertTest.HilbertDataset
formal_statement:
theorem auxPolynomial_zero
    {m n : Nat} (hm : 0 < m) :
    Belyi1980.auxPolynomial m n 0 = 0 := by
informal_prefix: /-- Belyi 1980 polynomial construction: the unscaled auxiliary polynomial sends 0 to 0 when m is positive. Use the checked source-layer theorem. -/
